name: @ecosystem/contracts
description: Shared data-exchange contracts for the athlete performance ecosystem: sync envelopes, payload schemas, identity links, and flow specifications. Seeded from the Olbrecht Energy Tracker sync domain and the Swim State Pro readiness contracts (ratified INTEGRATION_PLAN.md, 2026-06-12).
version_policy: See VERSIONING.md. Envelope format version lives in SYNC_SCHEMA_VERSION; this npm version tracks the package as a whole.
